name: @levnikolaevich/hex-line-mcp
description: Hash-verified file editing MCP + token efficiency hook for AI coding agents. 9 tools: inspect_path, read, edit, write, grep, outline, verify, changes, bulk_replace.

_dep_notes.web-tree-sitter: Tracks the latest stable runtime together with the repo-owned first-party grammar WASM bundle. Keep runtime upgrades coupled to grammar load/parse validation across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
_dep_notes.zod: Tracks Zod 4 natively with the current MCP SDK. Schema descriptions are contract-tested through listTools() output.
_dep_notes.better-sqlite3: Optional. Used only by lib/graph-enrich.mjs for readonly access to hex-graph .hex-skills/codegraph/index.db. Graceful fallback if absent.

author: Lev Nikolaevich <https://github.com/levnikolaevich>
